completedImprovements.title: Dashboard core monitoring surfaces are separated from per-entity AI execution CTAs
completedImprovements.evidence: Targeted DOM tests, type-check, lint, test:quick, docs checks, and production-source rg guard passed locally. Production dashboard source has no onAskAI/onAskAIAboutAlert/dashboard-alert-prefill/AIInsightBadge/alert-ai-context references.
completedImprovements.note: AI Assistant remains available through the global header/sidebar and /dashboard/ai-assistant route; no live LLM call was required for this UI boundary QA.

notes: Local deterministic QA only; release-facing production QA was skipped because this task changes dashboard UI boundary and tests, not deployed AI runtime behavior.
